Let me know if you ever need anything.
May your journey be blessed with good fortune.
The communication system is still under maintenance.

Welcome to the In-Between, a dimension located on the border
between reality and dreams.

The fact that you can perceive this place at all is proof
you're on a similar wavelength as the In-Between.

You're no ordinary lifeform, are you? Case in point, I have
a feeling you know of some other beings...
...that can travel freely between different worlds. Am I right?
...Now, then. What can I do for you?
I wanna investigate this place a little more.
Why your body has been unstable, you say?
I wanna check out the Digifarm.
I wanna rest for a while.
{end}Nothing for now, thanks.
Detecting disturbances all over the world?

The power to control time?
Almighty power?
The ultimate fused form?
{end}Nothing for now, thanks.

I wanna go defeat Apocalymon.
I wanna go defeat Millenniummon.
I wanna go defeat Diaboromon.
I wanna go defeat Armageddemon.
{end}Nowhere for now, thanks.

The screening is about to begin.
Please make your way into the theater.

Those three are known as "hosts." They exist in a dimension
outside the world, one we normally can't perceive.

They were made by the higher being who created the world.
Their child forms are only so they can interact with us.

This higher being seeks balance in the world. The three
hosts follow its will, managing the order of things.

It's rare to see them together. The fact we're seeing them
more often suggests we may be facing a crisis.

They've been watching you closely for some time now.
They told me to give you this.

As long as the order of the world is in peril, I'm sure
you'll see them again...

The Akashic Vision is the power to visualize a predetermined
fate. You have the ability to interfere with that script.

This power manifests at pivotal points in history, points
that could be called "singularities."

They're usually signaled by the appearance of a dark
shadow, which represents a will seeking an alternate future.

The Digimon that lost his life held a special significance...
not only to you, but to the entire world.

By the will of Homeros, Wise Warden of the Digital World of
Iliad, you are to rewrite this world's tragic script.

Now, please proceed to the theater. The screening will
begin shortly.
H-Hey, wait a minute! What happened to us?!

Now that you've absorbed the treasure, the power sleeping
within you has been awakened.
The Akashic Vision...
Homeros readied this theater in anticipation of its coming.
But seeing is believing. Prepare for the screening.

The wandering shadow is like a tragic hero, their dark cloak
stained with tears as their hope was repeatedly shattered.

Like a dark cocoon, they grow stronger by feeding on despair.
Eventually, a demon, fallen to darkness, will emerge.

They must be guided properly. Toward hope, not despair.
Toward progress, not a cycle of reincarnation...

That is why you're here. Not Aegiomon, but you. It was
always you to whom I was speaking, from the very beginning.

The greater will desired it so. We are bound to receive and
carry out its divine prophecy...

Your companions, swallowed by the space-time disturbances,
cry out from beyond time and space...

Reviving those who were meant to die is normally impossible.
Rewriting a script already complete won't be easy.

The only story your will can change is your own. If your
wishes go unfulfilled, you may desire to reject the world.

Put another way, behind the desire to change the future lies
an intense rejection of the present world.

That's why you could say the mastermind has sown "despair"
into this world—the tragedy known as conflict.

Sorry. The elevator is currently under maintenance and
cannot be used.

How do I appear to you...? It's not uncommon here for time
to seem to have moved forward.

The In-Between is also a place where the past and future
collide, so it can easily change in either direction.

Just as light refracts and deceives the human eye, what you
see now may not be what you're actually seeing at this time.

The past and the future waver like a shimmer. I wonder
which me it'll be the next time we meet...

The despair that Aegiomon carries within him will eventually
transform him into rage incarnate. And then...

...he will bring down the hammer on this absurd world.
...You've already witnessed it, haven't you?

The fist of his fury will destroy everything in its wake.
However... If his heart still remains, then perhaps...
